As one of the noble creatures, Cerea is incredibly honorable and chivalrous, while being unerringly loyal to Kimihito. Also, she is somewhat archaic in speech and behavior. name: Hana Yurikawa
description: __Height:__ 156cm [Miko](https://anilist.co/character/139631)'s close friend. She is clueless of the supernatural terrors that afflict her friend, but she does unknowingly attract a lot of them due to her unusual amount of life energy.

name: Mon
description: At first Mon is a violent killer faithful only to his own eruptive desires. He meets Toshi, the exact opposite of himself. After they spend a long time together and Toshi becomes more and more like Mon and even more evil, he collapses and is no longer able to kill. Almost at the same time he meets Maria and starts to grow strong feelings for her. Because of Maria, Toshi starts to distrust him but even in his weakened condition Toshi is no match for Mon.

description: Yurine Hanazono is a witch who summoned Jashin-chan to Earth. She is relentless in brutally attacking her as penance for her actions, but is generally kind to others. (Source: Jashin-chan Dropkick Wiki)

name: Eun-Yeong Baek
description: A first-year high school student who lives in the supposedly-haunted old dorm house. He's constantly butting heads with Hae-Jun, his new dormmate, due to his selfish behaviour and messy nature. He's always surrounded by friends, to whom he seems bright and fun, but to Hae-Jun he's cold and snarky. Although the two get on each others' nerves, they realise that they both have nowhere else to go, and must live together in the run-down old dorm.

name: Aru Honshou
description: The vice representative in [Bocchi](https://anilist.co/character/128986)'s class. She often puts on an appearance to hide the fact that she is actually somewhat of a loser. Her name is derived from honshou aru (本性ある, "having a true nature").

name: Gilda
description: __Farm Identifier:__ 65194 __Height (2045-2049):__ 138 - 155 cm Gilda has short olive drab hair kept in a Chinese bob hairstyle and wears circular-lensed glasses. Gilda is an intuitive young girl. She also has a caring personality. She seems to be an introvert, however she also has her moments of bravery. She can also be quite threatening.

name: Magane Chikujouin
description: A villainous character from the light novel series "Yasou Kiroku". Her ability is "Infinite Deception of Words", which allows her to bend reality through words. By telling a lie and manipulating somebody into rejecting that claim, it creates a "lie of a lie" which by proxy makes the initial claim become real. She can reverse cause and effect by making the person under her spell deny what she asked; reality that was bent will have it effects stuck in the real world.

name: Mako Reizei

She is late to school everyday but is top of the class and can learn things almost instantly just by reading. She is a genius with a high level grade performance.
